self_report.viz_verdict: The smooth convex curve g(x) = (x/2)(ln x - 1) has increments g(2n+1) - g(2n-1) that lie strictly between ln(2n-1) and ln(2n+1), supplying exactly the inductive bracketing for the asserted inequality.
self_report.notes: Spot checks at n=1..5 all satisfy g(2n-1) < ln(product of odds) < g(2n+1); induction via ∫_{2n-1}^{2n+1} (ln x)/2 dx ∈ (ln(2n-1), ln(2n+1)) closes both directions.
